title: steiropteris parva
intro: Steiropteris parva, also known as the small steiropteris fern, is a type of ancient fern species that belongs to the family Dipteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Steiropteris parva include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. Steiropteris parva can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
